texto: If real, regular, normal, boring life, (when you're at home every day, seeing the same people, doing the same things) is like sitting at home on the floor surrounded by toys... traveling feels to me like going to Toys R Us with your toy box and getting to trade stuff in and buy new things and explore whole new ideas.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alex Day: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “If real, regular, normal, boring life, (when you're at home every day, seeing the same people, do…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, change, change-your-life pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e viagem.
